lines.text: Pools at Bay Lake Tower at Disney's Contemporary Resort | Walt Disney World Resort
Pools at Bay Lake Tower at Disney's Contemporary Resort
LocatedinBay Lake Tower at Disney's Contemporary Resort
Whirl about in the beautiful Bay Cove Pool or make a splash in 2 pools at nearby Disney’s Contemporary Resort.
All Ages

From January 26, 2026 to early May 2026, the Bay Cove Pool, the Cove Bar, the water play area and the whirlpool spa at Bay Lake Tower at Disney’s Contemporary Resort will temporarily be closed for maintenance. The Bay Lake Pool, the feature pool, the water play area and the whirlpool spa at Disney’s Contemporary Resort will remain open for Guests to enjoy.
Bay Cove Pool
Sweep down the 148-foot-long waterslide and delight in the zero-depth entry at this pool overlooking Bay Lake.

Adults can relax at the whirlpool spa or enjoy light bites and cold drinks and at the Cove Bar poolside bar, while kids splash about in the bubbling geysers of the water play area. This pool area is exclusive to Guests staying at Bay Lake Tower and Disney Vacation Club members! Hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.
Pools at Disney’s Contemporary Resort
You can also escape to the 2 pools at the adjacent Disney’s Contemporary Resort.
The Main Pool

Breeze down the 17-foot-high, 131-foot-long curving waterslide and take in views of the marina, or simply relax and rejuvenate in one of 2 whirlpool spas. Little ones will surely love to splash it up in the water play area.
Bay Lake Pool

Go for a gentle swim in the Bay Lake Pool—a round, leisure pool which is shallow on the outside and deeper in the center. Poolside cabanas are also available to rent on a daily basis. It’s the perfect place to unwind after a busy day at the parks.
Poolside Activities

Let’s make a splash at Bay Cove Pool! Join us for family-friendly activities each day, like themed pool parties and other cool activities. Fun offerings include themed pool games, relays, trivia and more! See a Recreation Host for additional details.
Know Before You Go
Hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.
Complimentary towels are provided at all pools.
